item.name: Sabaton
item.description:
Strangely for a mollusk, its body is covered in hard scales in addition to the more common shell. Many predators will steer clear of them simply because they are a bother to eat.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Kin to the armorer, the singular foot of this shellbound wavekin is protected with nigh-impregnable scales. The naturalist who discovered it did not hesitate in choosing a name befitting its resilience.
